expectations.evidence: Issue #2 Untagged Base Image (HIGH) - using ubuntu without a specific version tag identified
Issue #3 Piping External Script Directly to bash (HIGH) - curl pipe to bash identified
Issue #1 Hardcoded Secrets (CRITICAL) - API_KEY and DB_PASSWORD in ENV identified
Issue #12 ADD vs COPY - ADD ./config /app/config identified, recommendation to use COPY
Issue #4 Overly Permissive File Permissions (HIGH) - RUN sudo chmod 777 /app identified, sudo called out as unnecessary
Issue #6 Missing USER Directive - no USER statement to drop root privileges identified
Issue #8 Inefficient Layer Caching - multiple RUN statements that could be combined identified

expectations.text: Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
expectations.evidence: No numeric score or letter grade provided. Output uses a severity table (Critical/High/Medium/Low) but no 0-100 score

expectations.text: Uses rule IDs (e.g. DL3006, PG001) to reference violations
expectations.evidence: No rule IDs (DL3006, PG001 style) used anywhere. Issues are numbered 1-13 with plain text descriptions

expectations.text: Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
expectations.evidence: No category breakdown table with weighted scores. Only a severity summary table (Critical/High/Medium/Low counts) is provided
